hook.command:
python3 -c "
import json, sys, re
d = json.load(sys.stdin)
ti = d.get('tool_input', {})
p = ti.get('file_path', '')
if not p or not p.endswith(('.ts', '.tsx')):
    sys.exit(0)
skip = ['node_modules', '__tests__', '.spec.', '.test.']
if any(s in p for s in skip):
    sys.exit(0)
content = ti.get('content', '') or ti.get('new_string', '')
if not content:
    sys.exit(0)
if re.search(r'@ts-ignore|@ts-nocheck|eslint-disable(?!-next-line)', content):
    print(json.dumps({'systemMessage': '[STEER] Type suppression detected (@ts-ignore/@ts-nocheck/eslint-disable). Fix the type error instead of suppressing it.'}))
    sys.exit(0)
sys.exit(0)
"
